title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to load the login page after the latest deployment.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Payment process fails due to gateway timeout error.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Customers cannot upload profile pictures larger than 2MB.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales data shown in dashboard does not match exported report.

title: Email notification not sending
description: System fails to send verification emails to new users.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Product search takes more than 10 seconds to return results.

title: Incorrect password reset link
description: Password reset link redirects to a broken page.

title: Mobile responsiveness issue
description: Homepage layout breaks on small screen devices.

title: Error 500 on checkout
description: Server throws 500 error when customer tries to checkout.

title: Discount coupon not applying
description: Valid coupon codes are not applying discount at checkout.

title: Account suspension without reason
description: Active customer account got suspended unexpectedly.

title: Report export not working
description: Export to PDF feature generates empty file.

title: Language translation missing
description: Some UI texts are not translated in Bangla version.

title: Two-factor authentication failure
description: OTP verification fails even with correct code.

title: Database connection error
description: Application intermittently loses connection to database.
